hooks.command: COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git push|git fetch|git worktree|runpodctl|ssh'; then exit 1; fi

MAIN_CHECKOUT="$(cd "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null || echo .)/.." && pwd)"; echo '{"status": "stopped"}' > "$MAIN_CHECKOUT/registry/spool/${CLAUDE_RUN_ID:-unknown}_final_state.json" || true
